'''鈭歡-p-h''' ('''kagapah''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:calque|calque]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-p-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:calque|calque]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歡-p-h
|-
! Lemma
| kagapah
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thigapah|thigapah]] || [[word:jigapah|jigapah]] || [[word:shigapah|shigapah]] || [[word:kigapah|kigapah]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthugapah|thuthugapah]] || [[word:jujugapah|jujugapah]] || [[word:shushugapah|shushugapah]] || [[word:kukugapah|kukugapah]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thugapah|thugapah]] || [[word:jugapah|jugapah]] || [[word:shugapah|shugapah]] || [[word:kugapah|kugapah]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thugapah|thugapah]] || [[word:jugapah|jugapah]] || [[word:shugapah|shugapah]] || [[word:kugapah|kugapah]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thegapah|thegapah]] || [[word:jegapah|jegapah]] || [[word:shegapah|shegapah]] || [[word:kegapah|kegapah]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothogapah|thothogapah]] || [[word:jojogapah|jojogapah]] || [[word:shoshogapah|shoshogapah]] || [[word:kokogapah|kokogapah]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thogapah|thogapah]] || [[word:jogapah|jogapah]] || [[word:shogapah|shogapah]] || [[word:kogapah|kogapah]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thogapah|thogapah]] || [[word:jogapah|jogapah]] || [[word:shogapah|shogapah]] || [[word:kogapah|kogapah]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:gapah|gapah]] || [[word:gapah|gapah]] || [[word:gapah|gapah]] || [[word:gapah|gapah]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:gapah|gapah]] || [[word:gapah|gapah]] || [[word:gapah|gapah]] || [[word:gapah|gapah]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:gapah|gapah]] || [[word:gapah|gapah]] || [[word:gapah|gapah]] || [[word:gapah|gapah]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:gapah|gapah]] || [[word:gapah|gapah]] || [[word:gapah|gapah]] || [[word:gapah|gapah]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙gapah|th忙gapah]] || [[word:j忙gapah|j忙gapah]] || [[word:sh忙gapah|sh忙gapah]] || [[word:k忙gapah|k忙gapah]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathagapah|thathagapah]] || [[word:jajagapah|jajagapah]] || [[word:shashagapah|shashagapah]] || [[word:kakagapah|kakagapah]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thagapah|thagapah]] || [[word:jagapah|jagapah]] || [[word:shagapah|shagapah]] || [[word:kagapah|kagapah]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thagapah|thagapah]] || [[word:jagapah|jagapah]] || [[word:shagapah|shagapah]] || [[word:kagapah|kagapah]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shagapah|shagapah]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshagapah|goshagapah]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishagapah|gokishagapah]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shagapahn眉|shagapahn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshagapahnkn眉|goshagapahnkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishagapahn眉|gokishagapahn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shagapahsh毛|shagapahsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshagapahnksh毛|goshagapahnksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishagapahsh毛|gokishagapahsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shagapahro|shagapahro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshagapahnkro|goshagapahnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishagapahro|gokishagapahro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shagapahmu|shagapahmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshagapahnkmu|goshagapahnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishagapahmu|gokishagapahmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shagapahsher|shagapahsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshagapahnksher|goshagapahnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishagapahsher|gokishagapahsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shagapahng|shagapahng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshagapahnkng|goshagapahnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishagapahng|gokishagapahng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shagapahya|shagapahya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshagapahnkya|goshagapahnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishagapahya|gokishagapahya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shagapahyam|shagapahyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshagapahnkyam|goshagapahnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishagapahyam|gokishagapahyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shagapahn眉sh毛|shagapahn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshagapahnkn眉sh毛|goshagapahnkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishagapahn眉sh毛|gokishagapahn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shagapahn眉ro|shagapahn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshagapahnkn眉ro|goshagapahnkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishagapahn眉ro|gokishagapahn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shagapahn眉mu|shagapahn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshagapahnkn眉mu|goshagapahnkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishagapahn眉mu|gokishagapahn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shagapahsh毛n眉|shagapahsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshagapahnksh毛n眉|goshagapahnksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishagapahsh毛n眉|gokishagapahsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shagapahsh毛ro|shagapahsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshagapahnksh毛ro|goshagapahnksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishagapahsh毛ro|gokishagapahsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shagapahsh毛mu|shagapahsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshagapahnksh毛mu|goshagapahnksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishagapahsh毛mu|gokishagapahsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shagapahron眉|shagapahron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshagapahnkron眉|goshagapahnkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishagapahron眉|gokishagapahron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shagapahrosh毛|shagapahrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshagapahnkrosh毛|goshagapahnkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishagapahrosh毛|gokishagapahrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shagapahromu|shagapahromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshagapahnkromu|goshagapahnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishagapahromu|gokishagapahromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shagapahmun眉|shagapahmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshagapahnkmun眉|goshagapahnkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishagapahmun眉|gokishagapahmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shagapahmush毛|shagapahmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshagapahnkmush毛|goshagapahnkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishagapahmush毛|gokishagapahmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shagapahmuro|shagapahmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshagapahnkmuro|goshagapahnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishagapahmuro|gokishagapahmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
